rules.description: caps_lock to esc/ctrl. Caps_lock becomes esc when pressed alone and ctrl when pressed with another key. Right_shift+caps_lock for actual caps lock.
Tab held = Hyper layer flag (no real modifiers held); tap alone = tab. Modifiers are emitted only per-key in the Hyper layer rule, so holding Tab while scrolling/clicking sends nothing.
Hyper layer: while Tab is held, any key = cmd+ctrl+opt+shift+key
